title: Associate Executive (Admin), Nursing Department
description:
Job Description:

  • Serve as a Receptionist, greets, directs and gives non-professional factual information to patients and relative.
  • Assist the nurse in tracing patient’s blood result and CXR report through ECLIPSYS-Sunrise
  • Assist in traffic control of patients and relative by directing them to the correct counter.
  • Communicate patient’s requests to Staff Nurse when needed.
  • Keys in the Appointment data entry for next day TCU.
  • Arrange discharged case notes for H/A to dispatch to appropriate Clinic for next day’s appointment.
  • Assist to arrange ad-hoc appointment for patient.
  • Check and maintain and ensure availability and adequate office supplies.
  • Raising of purchase requisition as required
  • Ordering of patient’s snack according to needs.
  • Handle internal and external enquiries. Give appropriate advice, direct calls to appropriate department and personnel.
  • Attend to incoming faxes.
  • Maintain confidentiality of information at all times.
  • Maintain proper filing of circulars and minutes of meeting.
  • Coordinate the distribution of minutes and reports.
  • Coordinate and provide all clerical functions related to Day Surgery:
  • Assist Nurses in checking and tracing case notes process.
  • Ensures pre-operative case notes are arranged neatly according to surgery dates.
  • Maintain proper records of case notes movement daily.
  • Assist Nurses to trace any blood and investigations test results.
  • Ensure pre-operative case notes are arranged accordingly to OT sessions.
  • Ensure abnormal ECG for Anaesthetist review are sent to Operating theatre.
  • Liaise or fax to Anaesthetists any abnormal ECG and results when necessary
  • Assign anaesthetist as per surgical need
  • Support and coordinate department’s TRS (Temperature Recording System) record.
  • Report any faults to Facility Management Department and follow up that jobs are completed
  • Perform any other duties as assigned by Supervisor.
  • Filling and ordering of consumables/ implants used
  • Ensure tidiness and cleanliness of the work station
  • Ensure a safe and pleasant working environment according to workplace safety and health regulations.
  • Attend yearly fire safety awareness talk and be responsible with emergency procedures.
  • Ensure consumables/ implants are not stock out for surgical use.
  • Performs and practices Standard Precaution at all times.
  • Attends Infection Control seminar.
  • Work harmoniously with team members to facilitate safe practices.
  • Participate in SNEC activities
  • Attends staff meetings
  • Attends Continuing Education training regularly

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma or Higher Nitec/ GCE N/ O / A level
  • Experience in procurement role will be a great advantage
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

postedCompany.description:
SINGAPORE NATIONAL EYE CENTRE PTE LTD

A dynamic organisation at the forefront of ophthalmic practice, SNEC is committed to developing our staff to their fullest potential. The Centre offers a stimulating environment for professional growth and development and also endeavours to provide a great workplace through a people-focused culture.

If you share our values in commitment to provide professional quality care to our patients, we welcome you to join "Team SNEC" in realising our mission of international eminence in ophthalmology.
